case_title: YICK, LILY MS. VS GODFREY, DAVID MR.

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF YICK, LILY MS. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT GODFREY, DAVID MR. PARTIES AGREED THAT THIS COULD BE HEARD WITH CASE #730261 ON 7/15/93 FORMERLY SCHEDULED ON 7/19/93 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT GODFREY, DAVID MR.
